title: SUCCESS: 2026-06-22: Mac Mini unresponsive/unusable over Screen Sharing. Starting load avg: 3.64, ending load avg: ~3.0. Found...
content: Approach: 2026-06-22: Mac Mini unresponsive/unusable over Screen Sharing. Starting load avg: 3.64, ending load avg: ~3.0. Found VNC loop: Screen Sharing.app (PID 92940) client on Mac Mini was connected back to the user's laptop (100.94.135.78:5900) while the user connected to the Mac Mini. Killed PID 92940 (Screen Sharing client) which broke the loop and restored connection usability without disconnecting the inbound screen share session.
